summary: Phase 4 Retention Engine Testing Complete. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed: ReturnBanner component shows 'Your story isn't over' headline with cliffhanger text and Continue button that navigates to Story Video Studio with prefilled data. StreakDisplay component shows in Dashboard sidebar and Profile Users Space tab with Day 3 milestone progress bar (+10 credits). FollowFeed section visible. Fixed bug: removed unused import 'start_pipeline' from retention_routes.py that was causing 500 error on seed-content endpoint.

issues: QuickStartGuide modal appears on dashboard load and may block interactions until dismissed - this is expected onboarding behavior for new users

critical_code_review_comments: ReturnBanner.js correctly implements 'Continue your story' banner with character name, cliffhanger text, and deep link to story-video-studio
StreakDisplay.js shows current streak, longest streak, next milestone progress bar, and reward info (+10 credits at Day 3, +25 at Day 7)
Dashboard.js includes ReturnBanner above AI Command Center (line ~311), StreakDisplay in sidebar (line ~589), and FollowFeed section
Profile.js includes StreakDisplay in Users Space tab (line ~344)
retention_routes.py implements streak tracking, return-banner API, content seeding, episode milestones, and nudge system
pipeline_engine.py integrates record_daily_activity and check_episode_milestone hooks at line ~1769
server.py registers retention_router at line ~181 and ~564, nudge scheduler at line ~1009
SELF_HOSTED_STACK.md architecture spec exists at /app/memory/SELF_HOSTED_STACK.md with GPU infrastructure, model stack (Qwen2.5, Wan2.1, Kokoro), and FFmpeg commands
seed_data_creation: Admin seed-content endpoint tested - creates QUEUED jobs in pipeline_jobs collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Retention Engine verified: (1) GET /api/retention/streak returns streak data with current_streak, longest_streak, next_milestone (3 or 7), next_reward (10 or 25), milestones_claimed, (2) GET /api/retention/return-banner returns has_story, cliffhanger, character_name, series_info for logged-in user, (3) POST /api/retention/admin/seed-content works for admin (queues stories), (4) GET /api/retention/admin/seed-status returns seed content stats, (5) ReturnBanner component renders above AI Command Center on Dashboard with 'Continue your story' heading, cliffhanger text, and Continue button that navigates to story-video-studio with prefilled data, (6) StreakDisplay shows in Dashboard sidebar and Profile Users Space tab with Day 3/Day 7 milestone progress, (7) FollowFeed section shows 'From Characters You Follow', (8) Nudge scheduler runs hourly (line 1009 in server.py), (9) record_daily_activity and check_episode_milestone integrated in pipeline_engine.py at line 1769, (10) SELF_HOSTED_STACK.md exists with GPU infrastructure, model stack, and FFmpeg commands

Streak_API.details: GET /api/retention/streak returns current_streak, longest_streak, next_milestone (3 or 7), next_reward (10 or 25), milestones_claimed

Return_Banner_API.details: GET /api/retention/return-banner returns has_story, story, cliffhanger, character_name, series_info

Content_Seeding_API.details: POST /api/retention/admin/seed-content works for admin, rejects non-admin. GET /api/retention/admin/seed-status returns stats

ReturnBanner_Component.details: Shows 'Your story isn't over' headline, cliffhanger text, Continue button. Navigates to story-video-studio with prefilled data

StreakDisplay_Dashboard.details: Shows in sidebar with current streak (0 days), Day 3 milestone progress bar, +10 credits reward

StreakDisplay_Profile.details: Shows in Users Space tab with Daily Streak, Day 3 reward progress, +10 credits indicator

FollowFeed_Section.details: Shows 'From Characters You Follow' section on Dashboard

Nudge_Scheduler.details: run_nudge_check runs hourly via asyncio loop in server.py startup (line 1009-1021)

Pipeline_Integration.details: record_daily_activity and check_episode_milestone called in pipeline_engine.py at line 1769-1778

Self_Hosted_Stack_Doc.details: /app/memory/SELF_HOSTED_STACK.md exists with GPU infrastructure, model stack (Qwen2.5, Wan2.1, Kokoro), FFmpeg commands

bug_fixed.root_cause: Unused import 'from services.pipeline_engine import start_pipeline' in retention_routes.py line 348 - function doesn't exist
